{"credits": [{"type": "reporter", "user": {"avatar_url": "https://avatars.githubusercontent.com/u/932934?v=4", "events_url": "https://api.github.com/users/pradtke/events{/privacy}", "followers_url": "https://api.github.com/users/pradtke/followers", "following_url": "https://api.github.com/users/pradtke/following{/other_user}", "gists_url": "https://api.github.com/users/pradtke/gists{/gist_id}", "gravatar_id": "", "html_url": "https://github.com/pradtke", "id": 932934, "login": "pradtke", "node_id": "MDQ6VXNlcjkzMjkzNA==", "organizations_url": "https://api.github.com/users/pradtke/orgs", "received_events_url": "https://api.github.com/users/pradtke/received_events", "repos_url": "https://api.github.com/users/pradtke/repos", "site_admin": false, "starred_url": "https://api.github.com/users/pradtke/starred{/owner}{/repo}", "subscriptions_url": "https://api.github.com/users/pradtke/subscriptions", "type": "User", "url": "https://api.github.com/users/pradtke", "user_view_type": "public"}}], "cve_id": "CVE-2025-65954", "cvss": {"score": 4.7, "vector_string": "CVSS:3.0/AV:N/AC:L/PR:N/UI:R/S:C/C:N/I:L/A:N"}, "cvss_severities": {"cvss_v3": {"score": 4.7, "vector_string": "CVSS:3.0/AV:N/AC:L/PR:N/UI:R/S:C/C:N/I:L/A:N"}, "cvss_v4": {"score": 0.0, "vector_string": null}}, "cwes": [{"cwe_id": "CWE-601", "name": "URL Redirection to Untrusted Site ('Open Redirect')"}], "description": "### Summary

The logout endpoint accepts a `url` query parameter to redirect to.  casserver treats that url as trusted, and either (depending on configuration) redirects the browser there, or shows a "you've been logged out" page with a link to continue to that url.

There are a number of other things broken with logout in 7 (cas v3 uses a different query parameters, etc)

### Details

https://github.com/simplesamlphp/simplesamlphp-module-casserver/blob/21418f7efbea8c4f078fd4a7d1b9eacf94dd4941/src/Controller/LogoutController.php#L104

Previous module checked the url against the valid service urls.

### PoC

The docker instructions from the README.md run an image with a vulnerable config. 

Accessing  https://localhost/cas/logout?url=https://google.com  will redirect to Google

### Impact

Impacted configs have

```php
'enable_logout' => true,
```

and are most impacted if they also have

```
'skip_logout_page' -> true,
```", "epss": {"percentage": 0.00269, "percentile": 0.18528}, "ghsa_id": "GHSA-cvrm-5hp6-h523", "github_reviewed_at": "2026-05-15T16:21:13Z", "html_url": "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-cvrm-5hp6-h523", "identifiers": [{"type": "GHSA", "value": "GHSA-cvrm-5hp6-h523"}, {"type": "CVE", "value": "CVE-2025-65954"}], "nvd_published_at": "2026-05-18T20:16:36Z", "published_at": "2026-05-15T16:21:13Z", "references": ["https://github.com/simplesamlphp/simplesamlphp-module-casserver/security/advisories/GHSA-cvrm-5hp6-h523", "https://github.com/simplesamlphp/simplesamlphp-module-casserver/blob/21418f7efbea8c4f078fd4a7d1b9eacf94dd4941/src/Controller/LogoutController.php#L104", "https://nvd.nist.gov/vuln/detail/CVE-2025-65954", "https://github.com/simplesamlphp/simplesamlphp-module-casserver/commit/0462f50f00b3bb300d83067d11b74146a57bb8e0", "https://github.com/simplesamlphp/simplesamlphp-module-casserver/commit/fb6c6f1c7b9e757c93c5c306e1d36405e64f6dc5", "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-cvrm-5hp6-h523"], "repository_advisory_url": "https://api.github.com/repos/simplesamlphp/simplesamlphp-module-casserver/security-advisories/GHSA-cvrm-5hp6-h523", "severity": "medium", "source_code_location": "https://github.com/simplesamlphp/simplesamlphp-module-casserver", "summary": "SimpleSAMLphp casserver: Open Redirect in logout", "type": "reviewed", "updated_at": "2026-05-19T16:08:51Z", "url": "https://api.github.com/advisories/GHSA-cvrm-5hp6-h523", "vulnerabilities": [{"first_patched_version": "7.0.0", "package": {"ecosystem": "composer", "name": "simplesamlphp/simplesamlphp-module-casserver"}, "vulnerable_functions": [], "vulnerable_version_range": ">= 7.0.0-rc1, < 7.0.0-rc3"}, {"first_patched_version": "6.3.1", "package": {"ecosystem": "composer", "name": "simplesamlphp/simplesamlphp-module-casserver"}, "vulnerable_functions": [], "vulnerable_version_range": "< 6.3.1"}], "withdrawn_at": null}

title: SimpleSAMLphp casserver: Open Redirect in logout
